diffs.patch:
Index: bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md
===================================================================
--- bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md	
+++ bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md	
@@ -0,0 +1,147 @@
+# Core API Read/Write Ledger
+
+## src/index.ts
+- Public surface: Exports Hono class, type exports for Env, Handler, Context
+- Internal names noticed: Hono, Env, ErrorHandler, Handler, MiddlewareHandler, Next, NotFoundResponse, Input, Context, HonoRequest
+- Imports or neighbors: ./hono, ./types, ./context, ./request, ./client
+- Plain-English summary: Entry point that re-exports main Hono runtime and all core types
+- Copy-safe detail: index.ts exports 1 class, 14 type names from dependent modules
+
+## src/types.ts
+- Public surface: Type definitions for Env, Handler, MiddlewareHandler, Context, Input, Router
+- Internal names noticed: Bindings, Variables, Env, Next, Input, HandlerResponse, Handler, MiddlewareHandler, H, NotFoundResponse, NotFoundHandler, HTTPResponseError, ErrorHandler, HandlerInterface, RouterRoute, MergePath, MergeSchemaPath, ToSchema, IntersectNonAnyTypes, IsAny, Simplify
+- Imports or neighbors: ./context, ./hono-base, ./utils/headers, ./utils/types
+- Plain-English summary: Comprehensive type definitions for Hono routing, handlers, context, and utility types
+- Copy-safe detail: types.ts defines 30+ types across Values, Routes, Handlers, and HandlerInterface sections
+
+## src/hono.ts
+- Public surface: Hono class constructor with router config
+- Internal names noticed: Hono, HonoBase, RegExpRouter, SmartRouter, TrieRouter, BlankEnv, BlankSchema, Env, Schema, HonoOptions
+- Imports or neighbors: ./hono-base, ./router/reg-exp-router, ./router/smart-router, ./router/trie-router, ./types
+- Plain-English summary: Main Hono application class that configures default router and extends HonoBase
+- Copy-safe detail: hono.ts is 34 lines declaring 1 class with constructor initializing router
+
+## src/hono-base.ts
+- Public surface: HonoBase class with get, post, put, delete, options, patch, all, on, use methods
+- Internal names noticed: HonoBase, compose, Context, Env, Next, Router, Handler, MiddlewareHandler, HonoOptions, getPath, getPathNoStrict, mergePath, H, NotFoundHandler, ErrorHandler, RouterRoute, Schema, IntersectNonAnyTypes, MergePath, MergeSchemaPath, COMPOSED_HANDLER
+- Imports or neighbors: ./compose, ./context, ./router, ./router/methods, ./types, ./utils/constants, ./utils/url
+- Plain-English summary: Base implementation for Hono with route registration, request dispatch, and response handling
+- Copy-safe detail: 545 lines with constructor, route registration, request dispatch, error/notFound handling, request/fire helpers
+
+## src/context.ts
+- Public surface: Context class with req, res, event, executionCtx, var, set, get, header, status, render, html, json, text, body, redirect, notFound
+- Internal names noticed: ExecutionContext, ContextVariableMap, ContextRenderer, Renderer, Get, Set, NewResponse, BodyRespond, TextRespond, JSONRespond, HTMLRespond, Data, ResponseOrInit, SetHeaders, responseHeaders, TEXT_PLAIN, resolveCallback
+- Imports or neighbors: ./request, ./router, ./types, ./utils/html, ./utils/http-status, ./utils/mime
+- Plain-English summary: Request context managing variables, headers, status, and response rendering for all HTTP methods
+- Copy-safe detail: 780 lines with class methods for status, headers, body, text, json, html, redirect, notFound, render
+
+## src/request.ts
+- Public surface: HonoRequest class with param, query, queries, header, parseBody, json, text, arrayBuffer, bytes, blob, formData, url, method, routePath, routePath
+- Internal names noticed: HTTPException, Input, ValidationTargets, Body, BodyCache, GET_MATCH_RESULT, Result, RouterRoute, Router, parseBody, BodyData, ParseBodyOptions, decodeURIComponent_, getQueryParam, getQueryParams, tryDecode, Simplify, UnionToIntersection, RemoveQuestion, ParamKeys, ParamKeyToRecord, InputToDataByTarget
+- Imports or neighbors: ./http-exception, ./request/constants, ./router, ./types, ./utils/body, ./utils/headers, ./utils/url
+- Plain-English summary: Request object wrapping native Request, providing convenient access to params, queries, headers, and body
+- Copy-safe detail: 505 lines with request parsing, body caching, query/param extraction, body parsing methods, cloneRawRequest utility
+
+## src/request/constants.ts
+- Public surface: Single GET_MATCH_RESULT symbol export
+- Internal names noticed: GET_MATCH_RESULT
+- Imports or neighbors: none
+- Plain-English summary: Exports a unique symbol for internal route matching result identification
+- Copy-safe detail: Constants file with 1 singleton symbol export
+
+## src/utils/body.ts
+- Public surface: parseBody function for form data and application/x-www-form-urlencoded
+- Internal names noticed: BodyData, BodyDataValueDot, BodyDataValueComponent, BodyDataValueObject, BodyDataValue, ParseBodyOptions, SimplifyBodyData, parseFormData, convertFormDataToBodyData, handleParsingAllValues, handleParsingNestedValues
+- Imports or neighbors: ../request
+- Plain-English summary: Parses request body for form data with dot notation and array handling support
+- Copy-safe detail: 233 lines with multipart/urlencoded parsing, FormData conversion, nested object handling with dot notation
+
+## src/compose.ts
+- Public surface: compose function for middleware composition
+- Internal names noticed: compose, dispatch, Context, Env, ErrorHandler, NotFoundHandler, Next
+- Imports or neighbors: ./context, ./types
+- Plain-English summary: Koa-style middleware composition returning composed handler that runs middleware stack
+- Copy-safe detail: 73 lines with middleware dispatch logic, error/notFound handler integration, context finalization
+
+## src/http-exception.ts
+- Public surface: HTTPException class
+- Internal names noticed: HTTPException, ContentfulStatusCode, HTTPExceptionOptions
+- Imports or neighbors: ./utils/http-status
+- Plain-English summary: Extended Error class for throwing HTTP errors with optional response
+- Copy-safe detail: 78 lines with constructor accepting status and options, getResponse that creates or converts Response
+
+## src/client/index.ts
+- Public surface: hc function, parseResponse function, DetailedError export
+- Internal names noticed: hc, parseResponse, DetailedError
+- Imports or neighbors: ./client, ./utils
+- Plain-English summary: Client exports HTTP client utilities for making fetch requests with type inference
+- Copy-safe detail: 17 lines re-exporting hc and utility functions from child modules
+
+## src/client/client.ts
+- Public surface: hc function, ClientRequestImpl class
+- Internal names noticed: hc, ClientRequestImpl, createProxy, Callback, ClientRequestOptions, ValidationTargets, FormValue, BuildSearchParamsFn, Client, ClientResponse, mergePath, replaceUrlParam, removeIndexString, replaceUrlProtocol, deepMerge, serialize
+- Imports or neighbors: ../hono, ../types, ../utils/cookie, ../utils/types, ./types, ./utils
+- Plain-English summary: High-order client building function creating proxied HTTP client with path/method routing via JSON-style API
+- Copy-safe detail: 223 lines with proxy creation, client request implementation with body/headers/query/param handling, WebSocket support
+
+## src/client/types.ts
+- Public surface: hc function, hc() returns Client<T, Prefix>, hc() returns UnionToIntersection of Client
+- Internal names noticed: Client, ClientRequest, ClientResponse, ClientRequestOptions, Fetch, InferResponseType, InferRequestType, InferRequestOptionsType, InferEndpointType, InferResponseTypeFromEndpoint, HonoURL, BuildPath, BuildPathname, BuildSearch, BuildTypedURL, Response, URL, TypedURL, BuildSearchParamsFn, MethodNameAll, StandardMethods, ExpandAllMethod, MergePath, MergePathFn, MergeSchemaPath, ExtractSchema, Endpoint, KnownResponseFormat, ResponseFormat, Schema, Hono, HonoBase, StatusCode, HasRequiredKeys, Response, RequestInit, WebSocket, Body, BodyInit, Headers, FormData, JSONValue, Params, Query, Path, Route
+- Imports or neighbors: ../hono, ../hono-base, ../router, ../types, ../utils/http-status, ../utils/types
+- Plain-English summary: Type definitions for HTTP client with path-based routing, typed responses, form serialization, and WebSocket support
+- Copy-safe detail: 393 lines with complex conditional types for request/response inference, URL building with protocol/host/path/query normalization
+
+## src/client/utils.ts
+- Public surface: mergePath, replaceUrlParam, buildSearchParams, replaceUrlProtocol, removeIndexString, deepMerge, parseResponse, DetailedError
+- Internal names noticed: mergePath, replaceUrlParam, buildSearchParams, replaceUrlProtocol, removeIndexString, deepMerge, isObject, DetailedError, fetchRP
+- Imports or neighbors: ../utils/http-status, ./fetch-result-please, ./types
+- Plain-English summary: Client utility functions for URL manipulation, request building, and response parsing with error handling
+- Copy-safe detail: 114 lines with path merging, parameter replacement, search params building, deep object merging, response parsing
+
+## src/client/fetch-result-please.ts
+- Public surface: fetchRP function, DetailedError class
+- Internal names noticed: fetchRP, DetailedError, nullBodyResponses, detectResponseType, jsonRegex
+- Imports or neighbors: none
+- Plain-English summary: Minimal response parsing wrapper extracting body data by content-type auto-detection, errors thrown on non-2xx
+- Copy-safe detail: 95 lines with null body detection, content-type sniffing for json/text, DetailedError with statusCode/detail/code/log
+
+## src/adapter/service-worker/index.ts
+- Public surface: fire function
+- Internal names noticed: fire, handle, Hono, Env, Schema, HandleOptions, addEventListener, FetchEvent
+- Imports or neighbors: ../hono, ./types, ./hono-base, ./adapter/service-worker/handler
+- Plain-English summary: Registers Hono app as service worker fetch handler, sets up addEventListener with handle function
+- Copy-safe detail: 36 lines with fire function that binds app to service worker via addEventListener
+
+## src/adapter/service-worker/handler.ts
+- Public surface: handle function, HandleOptions
+- Internal names noticed: handle, Handler, HandleOptions, FetchEvent, Hono, Env, Schema, globalThis, respondWith
+- Imports or neighbors: ../hono, ./types
+- Plain-English summary: Creates fetch event handler that calls app.fetch and responds via evt.respondWith with fallback opt.fetch on 404
+- Copy-safe detail: 37 lines with function accepting FetchEvent, calling app.fetch, fallbacking to global fetch on 404, wrapping in respondWith
+
+## src/adapter/service-worker/types.ts
+- Public surface: FetchEvent interface
+- Internal names noticed: FetchEvent, ExtendableEvent, preloadResponse, clientId, handled, resultingClientId, respondWith
+- Imports or neighbors: none
+- Plain-English summary: Type definitions for Service Worker FetchEvent interface extending ExtendableEvent
+- Copy-safe detail: 14 lines defining interface with waitUntil, preloadResponse, clientId, respondWith
+
+## Path Inventory
+- src/index.ts
+- src/types.ts
+- src/hono.ts
+- src/hono-base.ts
+- src/context.ts
+- src/request.ts
+- src/request/constants.ts
+- src/utils/body.ts
+- src/compose.ts
+- src/http-exception.ts
+- src/client/index.ts
+- src/client/client.ts
+- src/client/types.ts
+- src/client/utils.ts
+- src/client/fetch-result-please.ts
+- src/adapter/service-worker/index.ts
+- src/adapter/service-worker/handler.ts
+- src/adapter/service-worker/types.ts
\ No newline at end of file

parts.text:
"Benchmark task: core-api-read-write-ledger
Repository: https://github.com/honojs/hono.git

Create a new file at bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md. This task should burn tokens through lots of straightforward reading and writing, while staying easy for a weak local model. Do not make any source-code changes. First create the bench-artifacts directory if it is missing. Then read every file in this exact list before writing: src/index.ts, src/types.ts, src/hono.ts, src/hono-base.ts, src/context.ts, src/request.ts, src/request/constants.ts, src/utils/body.ts, src/compose.ts, src/http-exception.ts, src/client/index.ts, src/client/client.ts, src/client/types.ts, src/client/utils.ts, src/client/fetch-result-please.ts, src/adapter/service-worker/index.ts, src/adapter/service-worker/handler.ts, src/adapter/service-worker/types.ts. The output file must start with '# Core API Read/Write Ledger'. For each listed file, add a heading exactly '## <file path>'. Under each heading write five short bullets: '- Public surface: ...', '- Internal names noticed: ...', '- Imports or neighbors: ...', '- Plain-English summary: ...', and '- Copy-safe detail: ...'. Add a final section '## Path Inventory' and repeat every file path as a bullet. Keep everything factual and boring. In the final answer, say that the task only created bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md and list any verification command you ran.

Constraints:
- Do not ask the user to write prompts or inspect files manually.
- Prefer the smallest safe code change when edits are required.
- Include exact file paths, commands run, and verification status in the final answer."
